title: No Hiding
description: There's no use hiding, they'll find you anyway. Monsters are now always chasing you!
body:
# No Hiding
This mod turns Minecraft's world incredibly hostile. Every monster will always chase you, even if they cannot see you. This means that you can't take a nice evening stroll in the forest anymore without getting ambushed by dozens of monsters trying to kill you, whether it's zombies, skeletons, creepers or even endermen!

And don't think you are safe in your own base either... Creepers don't take it kindly to be left outside. If they can't reach you, they WILL try to just bomb their way through to you!

## Technical info
- Other 1.19.* versions of Minecraft MIGHT work with this mod but are not officially supported.
- This mod might have a moderate performance impact on the game depending on your hardware specs.
- All monsters in a range of **256 blocks** will immediately turn aggressive towards you.
- Multiplayer has not been tested and will probably never be officially supported.
